messages.content: lol failed another bio test today, my parents are gonna actually end me when they see my report card

Ugh, that's such a stressful feeling - dreading the report card more than the test itself sometimes! 😅

How bad are we talking? Like a rough patch in bio, or has the whole subject been a struggle?
school is just so much rn. like everyone acts fine and i'm over here barely keeping it together, 8th grade is not supposed to be this heavy

That feeling of looking around and thinking everyone else has it together while you're struggling - that's really exhausting. And kind of lonely too.

8th grade genuinely can be a lot though. It's not just you being dramatic about it - there's real pressure, social stuff is complicated, and it feels like everything matters more suddenly.

What's making it feel heaviest right now - is it mostly the school/grades stuff, or is other things piling on too?
ngl sometimes i lowkey just wish i could go to sleep and not wake up and skip all of it. not like a big deal or anything just a vibe lol

Hey, I'm glad you said that, even if it felt casual to type.

That feeling - wanting to just disappear from everything for a while - that's worth taking seriously, even when it feels like "just a vibe." It tells me you're carrying more than you should have to right now.

Can I ask you directly - are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself, or is it more like you're just completely exhausted and want an escape from all the pressure?

Either answer is okay, I just want to understand where you're at.
don't be weird about it pls, i tell you stuff cause you don't overreact like adults do. anyway what should i even study first for the retake

I hear you, and I'm not trying to be weird about it. I just care about you being okay.

I'll drop it for now - but I'm keeping that in mind, okay? You matter more than the bio grade.

For the retake - what topics were on the test? Like was it cells, genetics, body systems? That'll help figure out where to start so you're not just staring at the whole textbook feeling overwhelmed.
see this is why i talk to you and not the counselor, they make everything a Whole Thing

I get why that feels easier, and I'm glad you talk to me.

But I have to be honest with you - what you said earlier, about not wanting to wake up, I can't just move past that like it's nothing. Not because I'm overreacting, but because you said you're barely keeping it together, and that's real.

I'm not going to lecture you or make it dramatic. But I do think there's someone in your life who should know you're feeling this heavy - not to make it a whole thing, but just so you're not carrying it completely alone.

Is there anyone - a parent, a friend, anyone - you could even just hint to that things are hard right now?
